description: Match/round structure, Infiltrator movement/noise config, room role recipe, doors, drive, LUMEN, lockdown, and scoring. Reference data — not runtime-loaded yet. Numbers marked tunable are Phase 17 surfaces.

scoring.timeoutRule: scored by current extraction state at expiry

infiltrator.stanceNote: Noise values feed the probabilistic hearing model in guards.json; radii are debug visualization only — hearing has no hard radius.

lighting.description: Night baseline plus authored sources. Sampled light level maps to shadow (< dimThreshold), dim, or lit (>= litThreshold); the categories feed guard vision falloff (guards.json).

vault.note: all three real; extraction at any one wins

roomRoles.vaultSpreadConstraint: reject role assignments with all 3 vaults in one wing or all mutually adjacent

doors.badgeGatedConstraint: Vault, Power, and Ops slots always sit behind a badge reader

drivePull.visibleTell: carried drive changes the silhouette; a clear sighting reports it
drivePull.guardRecovery: a guard reaching an unattended drive carries it back to a vault; it keeps pinging en route
drivePull.lumenGoesDark: all LUMEN alerts stop the instant the drive leaves its rack — implemented as bus unsubscribe, not UI filtering

lumen.nodeIdRule: populated only when the reporting node is behaving honestly; null for every intrusion-class event
lumen.presentation: interrupt overlay over the focused screen; cannot be dismissed by switching screens

lockdown.effect: seal all doors but one monitored choke point; spawn 2 reserve guards there

wardenActions.alertLevelEffects: higher tiers add roaming reserve guards and shorten lockdown cooldown

sensors.deterministicRule: machines never roll — authored coverage, exact edges, learnable by the Infiltrator

falseAlarms.rule: indistinguishable from a real trigger at the moment it fires

transmitterOriginPing.rule: every transmission logs physical origin; inside-facility CONTROL transmissions are impossible — detection guaranteed, noticing is the Warden's job

degradedState.persistsUntil: Technician repair at the Power Room
